title: Upon Gubbs. Epig.
content:
Gubbs calls his children kitlings: and would bound,
    Some say, for joy, to see those kitlings drown'd.
meaning:
"Upon Gubbs. Epig." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
